---
title: "Pull genotype data from T3"
author: Charlotte Brault
output: html_document
date: '`r format(Sys.time(), "%d %B, %Y")`'
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Libraries

```{r load libraries}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(here)) # root directory
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(data.table)) # load data
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(apercu)) # ap
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr)) # formatting
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(purrr)) # handle lists
## devtools::install_github("chabrault/HRSWGS") # custom package instal
#suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(HRSWGS)) # custom package
## devtools::install_github("TriticeaeToolbox/BrAPI.R")
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(BrAPI)) # T3 connection
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT)) # print table
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(ggplot2)) # plot
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(vcfR)) # load vcf
```


# Set up root directory

```{r current dir}
here::i_am("analysis/pullGenoTrial.Rmd")
source(here("code","useful_functions.R"))
```


```{r}
trials_predictathon <- c("AWY1_DVPWA_2024","TCAP_2025_MANKS","25_Big6_SVREC_SVREC",
                         "OHRWW_2025_SPO","CornellMaster_2025_McGowan","24Crk_AY2-3",
                         "2025_AYT_Aurora","YT_Urb_25","STP1_2025_MCG")
```


# Create T3 connection

What's the difference between getBrAPIConnection and createBrAPIConnection?
```{r}
#wheat <- getBrAPIConnection("T3/Wheat")
db <- getBrAPIConnection("T3/Wheat")
wheat <- createBrAPIConnection("wheat.triticeaetoolbox.org", is_breedbase=TRUE)
#trials_df <- T3BrapiHelpers::getAllTrialMetaData(wheat,"Wheat")
```


<!-- # Get genotyping protocols that have data for any of the trial's accessions -->

<!-- ## Extract genotype names from trials -->

<!-- From BrAPI reference page (https://triticeaetoolbox.github.io/BrAPI.R/#breedbase-functions) -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- # Find accessions that were observed in these trials -->
<!-- geno_number <- map(trials_predictathon, \(x) { -->
<!--   wheat$wizard("accessions", list(trials = x), verbose=F)$data$ids -->
<!-- })  -->
<!-- names(geno_number) <- trials_predictathon -->
<!-- ap(geno_number) -->
<!-- sapply(geno_number,length) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- We can also extract genotype names instead of numbers (replace `data$ids` by `data$names`) -->

<!-- ## Get genotyping protocols -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- # Get genotyping protocols that have data for any of the trial's accessions -->
<!-- geno_protocols <- map(geno_number, \(x) -->
<!--                       wheat$wizard("genotyping_protocols", list(accessions = x), verbose=F)$data$ids) -->
<!-- names(geno_protocols) <- trials_predictathon -->
<!-- ap(geno_protocols) -->
<!-- ## map the protocol name and id -->
<!-- protocol_ids <- unique(unlist(geno_protocols)) -->
<!-- protocol_names <- unique(unlist(map(geno_number, \(x) -->
<!--                                     wheat$wizard("genotyping_protocols", list(accessions = x), verbose=F)$data$names))) -->

<!-- df_protocols <- tibble( -->
<!--   protocol_id = protocol_ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = protocol_names -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- ## match for each genotype in each trial the genotyping protocol -->
<!-- geno_matches <- map(geno_number, \(x) db$filter_geno_protocols(x)$data$matches) -->
<!-- names(geno_matches) <- trials_predictathon -->
<!-- geno_matches_df <- bind_rows(geno_matches, .id="trial") -->
<!-- DT::datatable(geno_matches_df) -->
<!-- # geno_pro <- map(geno_number, \(x) -->
<!-- #   wheat$wizard("genotyping_projects", list(accessions = x), verbose=F)$data) -->

<!-- ``` -->
<!-- Visualize the matches -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- protocols <- colnames(geno_matches_df)[-c(1,2)] -->
<!-- geno_matches_df_long <- tidyr::pivot_longer(geno_matches_df, -->
<!--                                             cols = all_of(protocols), -->
<!--                                             names_to = "protocol_id", -->
<!--                                             values_to = "matches") -->
<!-- ggplot(geno_matches_df_long, -->
<!--        aes(x=accession, y=protocol_id, fill=matches)) + -->
<!--   facet_wrap(~trial, scales="free_x")+ -->
<!--   geom_tile()+ -->
<!--   theme(axis.text=element_blank()) -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ## Download vcf for all focal trials -->

<!-- ### TCAP_2025_MANKS -->
<!-- Download the TCAP_2025_MANKS  -->


<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- ## Download genotypic VCF for one trial: TCAP_2025_MANKS -->
<!-- ## Strategy: -->
<!-- ## 1) Identify which genotyping protocol covers the most accessions in this trial -->
<!-- ## 2) Map protocol name -> protocol ID -->
<!-- ## 3) From archived VCFs for that protocol, choose KSU_2024_Allegro_V2 -->
<!-- ## 4) Download into data/genotypic/<trial>/raw/ -->
<!-- ## 5) Write a manifest.csv documenting what was downloaded -->

<!-- tri <- "TCAP_2025_MANKS" -->

<!-- # 1) Choose protocol with maximum coverage in this trial (based on geno_matches_df) -->
<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial", "accession", "accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p) { -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- best_protocol_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- message("Best protocol by coverage: ", best_protocol_name) -->

<!-- # 2) Map protocol name -> protocol ID (for this trial's accession set) -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- prot_id <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_protocol_name] -->

<!-- if (length(prot_id) != 1) { -->
<!--   stop("Could not uniquely identify protocol_id for: ", best_protocol_name) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- message("Selected protocol_id: ", prot_id) -->

<!-- # 3) Choose archived VCF file for this protocol (explicitly choose KSU_2024_Allegro_V2) -->
<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot_id, verbose = FALSE) -->

<!-- # filter to KSU projects and choose KSU_2024 specifically -->
<!-- row <- vcf_list[vcf_list$project_name == "KSU_2024_Allegro_V2", ] -->

<!-- if (nrow(row) != 1) { -->
<!--   stop("Expected exactly 1 archived VCF for project_name == KSU_2024_Allegro_V2") -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- project_id <- row$project_id -->
<!-- file_name  <- row$file_name -->

<!-- message("Using project_id: ", project_id) -->
<!-- message("Using file_name: ", file_name) -->

<!-- # 4) Download into trial folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here::here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot_id, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- stopifnot(file.exists(out_file)) -->
<!-- message("Downloaded to: ", out_file) -->

<!-- # 5) Write manifest for reproducibility -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_id, -->
<!--   protocol_name = best_protocol_name, -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = row$project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here::here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- stopifnot(file.exists(manifest_path)) -->
<!-- message("Manifest written to: ", manifest_path) -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ### 25_Big6_SVREC_SVREC -->

<!-- Download the 25_Big6_SVREC_SVREC -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "25_Big6_SVREC_SVREC" -->

<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial","accession","accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p){ -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE) -->
<!-- best_prot_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- best_prot_name -->

<!-- ## Protocal IDs -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- prot_tbl -->
<!-- prot_id <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- prot_id -->

<!-- #Archive protocal 296 -->
<!-- prot <- 296 -->

<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot, verbose = FALSE) -->

<!-- # Inspect the returned table -->
<!-- vcf_list -->
<!-- names(vcf_list) -->

<!-- #Download the vcf -->

<!-- project_id <- vcf_list$project_id[1] -->
<!-- project_name <- vcf_list$project_name[1] -->
<!-- file_name <- vcf_list$file_name[1] -->

<!-- # create output folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->
<!-- # download -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- # verify download -->
<!-- out_file -->
<!-- file.exists(out_file) -->

<!-- # write manifest -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   protocol_name = "ThermoFisher AgriSeq 4K", -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- manifest_path -->
<!-- file.exists(manifest_path) -->


<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ### OHRWW_2025_SPO -->

<!-- Download the OHRWW_2025_SPO -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "OHRWW_2025_SPO" -->

<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial","accession","accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p){ -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE) -->
<!-- best_prot_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- best_prot_name -->

<!-- ## Protocal IDs -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- prot_tbl -->
<!-- prot_id <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- prot_id -->

<!-- #Archive protocal 299 -->
<!-- prot <- 299 -->

<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot, verbose = FALSE) -->

<!-- # Inspect the returned table -->
<!-- vcf_list -->
<!-- names(vcf_list) -->

<!-- #Download the vcf -->
<!-- #Filtering the correct project  -->
<!-- row <- vcf_list |>  -->
<!--   dplyr::filter(project_name == "UWM_2025_3K") -->

<!-- stopifnot(nrow(row) == 1) -->

<!-- project_id   <- row$project_id -->
<!-- project_name <- row$project_name -->
<!-- file_name    <- row$file_name -->


<!-- # create output folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->

<!-- # download -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- # verify download -->
<!-- out_file -->
<!-- file.exists(out_file) -->

<!-- # write manifest -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   protocol_name = "ThermoFisher AgriSeq 4K", -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- manifest_path -->
<!-- file.exists(manifest_path) -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ### CornellMaster_2025_McGowan -->

<!-- Download the CornellMaster_2025_McGowan -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "CornellMaster_2025_McGowan" -->

<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial","accession","accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p){ -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE) -->
<!-- best_prot_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- best_prot_name -->

<!-- ## Protocal IDs -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- prot_tbl -->
<!-- prot_id <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- prot_id -->

<!-- # Archived protocol for this trial -->
<!-- prot <- 304 -->

<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot, verbose = FALSE) -->

<!-- # For reproducibility: always define protocol name from vcf_list -->
<!-- prot_name <- unique(vcf_list$protocol_name) -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot_name) == 1) -->

<!-- # Filter the correct project (exact match is OK since vcf_list has one row) -->
<!-- row <- vcf_list |> -->
<!--   dplyr::filter(project_name == "Cornell_WWWMasterScreening_2024_V2") -->

<!-- stopifnot(nrow(row) == 1) -->

<!-- project_id   <- row$project_id -->
<!-- project_name <- row$project_name -->
<!-- file_name    <- row$file_name -->

<!-- # create output folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->

<!-- # download -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- stopifnot(file.exists(out_file)) -->

<!-- # Write the manifest  -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_name, -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- manifest -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ### 24Crk_AY2-3 -->

<!-- Download the 24Crk_AY2-3 -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "24Crk_AY2-3" -->

<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial","accession","accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p){ -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE) -->
<!-- best_prot_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- best_prot_name -->

<!-- ## Protocal IDs -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- prot_tbl -->
<!-- prot_id <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- prot_id -->

<!-- # Archived protocol for this trial -->
<!-- prot <- 294 -->

<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot, verbose = FALSE) -->
<!-- vcf_list   -->

<!-- # For reproducibility: always define protocol name from vcf_list -->
<!-- prot_name <- unique(vcf_list$protocol_name) -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot_name) == 1) -->

<!-- # Filter the correct project (exact match is OK since vcf_list has one row) -->
<!-- row <- vcf_list |> -->
<!--   dplyr::filter(project_name == "UMN_2022_GBS") -->

<!-- stopifnot(nrow(row) == 1) -->

<!-- project_id   <- row$project_id -->
<!-- project_name <- row$project_name -->
<!-- file_name    <- row$file_name -->

<!-- # create output folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->

<!-- # download -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- stopifnot(file.exists(out_file)) -->

<!-- # Write the manifest  -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_name, -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- manifest -->
<!-- ``` -->



<!-- ### YT_Urb_25 -->

<!-- Download the YT_Urb_25 -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "YT_Urb_25" -->

<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial","accession","accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p){ -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE) -->
<!-- best_prot_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- best_prot_name -->

<!-- ## Protocal IDs -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->


<!-- prot_tbl -->
<!-- prot_id <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- prot_id -->

<!-- prot <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot) == 1) -->

<!-- # Archived protocol for this trial -->
<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot, verbose = FALSE) -->
<!-- vcf_list   -->

<!-- # For reproducibility: always define protocol name from vcf_list -->
<!-- prot_name <- unique(vcf_list$protocol_name) -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot_name) == 1) -->

<!-- # Filter the correct project (exact match is OK since vcf_list has one row) -->
<!-- row <- vcf_list |> -->
<!--   dplyr::filter(project_name == "UIUC_2024_GBS_V2") -->
<!-- stopifnot(nrow(row) == 1) -->

<!-- project_id   <- row$project_id -->
<!-- project_name <- row$project_name -->
<!-- file_name    <- row$file_name -->

<!-- # create output folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->

<!-- # download -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- stopifnot(file.exists(out_file)) -->

<!-- # Write the manifest  -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_name, -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- manifest -->
<!-- ``` -->



<!-- ### STP1_2025_MCG -->

<!-- Download the STP1_2025_MCG -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "STP1_2025_MCG" -->

<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial","accession","accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p){ -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE) -->
<!-- best_prot_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- best_prot_name -->

<!-- ## Protocal IDs -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->
<!-- prot_tbl -->

<!-- prot <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot) == 1) -->


<!-- # Archived protocol for this trial -->
<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot, verbose = FALSE) -->
<!-- vcf_list   -->

<!-- # For reproducibility: always define protocol name from vcf_list -->
<!-- prot_name <- unique(vcf_list$protocol_name) -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot_name) == 1) -->

<!-- # Filter the correct project (exact match is OK since vcf_list has one row) -->
<!-- row <- vcf_list |> -->
<!--   dplyr::filter(project_name == "TAMU_2025_MCG25") -->
<!-- stopifnot(nrow(row) == 1) -->

<!-- project_id   <- row$project_id -->
<!-- project_name <- row$project_name -->
<!-- file_name    <- row$file_name -->

<!-- # create output folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->

<!-- # download -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- stopifnot(file.exists(out_file)) -->

<!-- # Write the manifest  -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_name, -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- manifest -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ### 2025_AYT_Aurora -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "2025_AYT_Aurora" -->

<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial","accession","accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p){ -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE) -->
<!-- best_prot_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- best_prot_name -->

<!-- ## Protocal IDs -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->
<!-- prot_tbl -->

<!-- prot <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot) == 1) -->


<!-- # Archived protocol for this trial -->
<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot, verbose = FALSE) -->
<!-- vcf_list   -->

<!-- # For reproducibility: always define protocol name from vcf_list -->
<!-- prot_name <- unique(vcf_list$protocol_name) -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot_name) == 1) -->

<!-- # Filter the correct project (exact match is OK since vcf_list has one row) -->
<!-- row <- vcf_list |> -->
<!--   dplyr::filter(project_name == "SDSU_2025_GBS") -->
<!-- stopifnot(nrow(row) == 1) -->

<!-- project_id   <- row$project_id -->
<!-- project_name <- row$project_name -->
<!-- file_name    <- row$file_name -->

<!-- # create output folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->

<!-- # download -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- stopifnot(file.exists(out_file)) -->

<!-- # Write the manifest  -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_name, -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- manifest -->

<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ### AWY1_DVPWA_2024 -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "AWY1_DVPWA_2024" -->

<!-- one <- geno_matches_df |> dplyr::filter(trial == tri) -->
<!-- prot_cols <- setdiff(colnames(one), c("trial","accession","accessionName")) -->

<!-- counts <- sapply(prot_cols, function(p){ -->
<!--   x <- one[[p]] -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   sum(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- sort(counts, decreasing = TRUE) -->
<!-- best_prot_name <- names(which.max(counts)) -->
<!-- best_prot_name -->

<!-- ## Protocal IDs -->
<!-- prot_data <- wheat$wizard( -->
<!--   "genotyping_protocols", -->
<!--   list(accessions = geno_number[[tri]]), -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- )$data -->

<!-- prot_tbl <- data.frame( -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot_data$ids, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_data$names, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->
<!-- prot_tbl -->

<!-- prot <- prot_tbl$protocol_id[prot_tbl$protocol_name == best_prot_name] -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot) == 1) -->


<!-- # Archived protocol for this trial -->
<!-- vcf_list <- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id = prot, verbose = FALSE) -->
<!-- vcf_list   -->

<!-- # For reproducibility: always define protocol name from vcf_list -->
<!-- prot_name <- unique(vcf_list$protocol_name) -->
<!-- stopifnot(length(prot_name) == 1) -->
<!-- my_accessions <- geno_number[[tri]] -->
<!-- resp <- db$filter_geno_projects(my_accessions) -->
<!-- row <- vcf_list |> -->
<!--   dplyr::filter(project_id == 14509) |> #10657) |>  -->
<!--   head(1) -->
<!-- stopifnot(nrow(row) == 1) -->

<!-- project_id   <- row$project_id -->
<!-- project_name <- row$project_name -->
<!-- file_name    <- row$file_name -->

<!-- # create output folder -->
<!-- out_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw") -->
<!-- dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE) -->

<!-- out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tri, "_", row$project_name, ".vcf.gz")) -->

<!-- # download -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output = out_file, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- stopifnot(file.exists(out_file)) -->

<!-- # Write the manifest  -->
<!-- manifest <- data.frame( -->
<!--   trial = tri, -->
<!--   protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   protocol_name = prot_name, -->
<!--   project_id = project_id, -->
<!--   project_name = project_name, -->
<!--   file_name = file_name, -->
<!--   out_file = out_file, -->
<!--   stringsAsFactors = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- manifest_path <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "manifest.csv") -->
<!-- write.csv(manifest, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE) -->

<!-- manifest -->
<!-- ``` -->


# Convert vcf files to genomic matrix

Take the vcf file downloaded from the Predictathon webpage.
Define the path to the vcf file and use the custom function `format_curate_vcf` to generate an imputed numeric matrix.

```{r}
for(tri in trials_predictathon){
  write(paste0("Processing trial: ", tri), stdout())
  #file <- list.files(here("data","genotypic",tri,"raw"))[1]
  file <- list.files(here("data","genotypic",tri,"T3"))
  p2d <- here("data","genotypic",tri,"clean")
  if(!dir.exists(p2d)) dir.create(p2d, recursive = TRUE)
  
  vcf.p2f <- paste0(here("data","genotypic",tri,"T3"),"/",file)
  
  p2f.export.vcf <- paste0(p2d,"/",tri,"_Predictathon_genotypes_curated.vcf.gz")
  ## use custom function from useful_functions.R
  geno <- format_curate_vcf(vcf.p2f=vcf.p2f,
                            p2f.export.vcf=p2f.export.vcf,
                            remove.chrUkn=FALSE,
                            check.mrk.dups=TRUE,
                            remove.nonPolyMrk=FALSE,
                            tresh.heterozygous=NULL,
                            check.geno.dups=TRUE,
                            thresh.NA.ind=0.5,
                            thresh.NA.mrk=0.5,
                            format.names=FALSE,
                            imputation="Beagle",
                            p2f.beagle=here("code","beagle.27Feb25.75f.jar"),
                            thresh.MAF=0.01,
                            verbose=1)
  
  ## export numeric imputed geno file
  p2f <- paste0(p2d,"/",tri,"_Predictathon_genotypes_curated_numeric.rds")
  saveRDS(geno, file=p2f)
  # 
  # vcf <- vcfR::read.vcfR(file=vcf.p2f, verbose=FALSE)
  # gt <- vcfR::extract.gt(vcf, element = "GT",
  #                        as.numeric=F, IDtoRowNames = T)
  # mrk_info <- tibble::as_tibble(vcfR::getFIX(vcf)) 
  # mrk_info <- mrk_info |> 
  #   mutate(POS=as.numeric(POS)) |> arrange(CHROM, POS) 
  # # save R data
  # rownames(gt) <- mrk.info$ID
  # 
  # 
  # ## transform to 0/1/2 matrix
  # 
  # 
  # ## export
  # 
  # out_rdata <- here("data", "genotypic", tri, "raw", paste0(tri,"_genotypes.RData"))
  # save(gt, mrk_info, file=out_rdata)
  # message("Saved RData to: ", out_rdata)
  
}
```


<!-- For the first trial (AWY1_DVPWA_2024), there is only one genotyping protocol (291 = ThermoFisher AgriSeq 5K), let's download a VCF for this one. -->

<!-- ## Download vcf for one trial -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- tri <- "AWY1_DVPWA_2024" -->
<!-- (prot <- geno_protocols[[tri]][1]) -->
<!-- (geno_ids <- geno_number[[tri]]) -->
<!-- geno_names <- wheat$wizard("accessions", list(trials = tri), verbose=F)$data$names -->
<!-- proj <-  wheat$wizard("genotyping_projects", list(accessions = geno_ids), verbose=F)$data$ids -->

<!-- ## check available files for this protocol -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived_list(genotyping_protocol_id=prot, verbose=T) -->

<!-- ## define path to file to export -->
<!-- p2f <- here("data","genotypic",paste0(tri,"_genotypes_",prot,"protocol.vcf")) -->
<!-- ## export vcf -->
<!-- wheat$vcf_archived( -->
<!--   output=p2f, -->
<!--   genotyping_protocol_id = prot, -->
<!--   genotyping_project_id = proj, -->
<!--   file_name = "2025-12-10_17:56:29_filevCTU", -->
<!--   verbose = FALSE -->
<!-- ) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- There are two files for the same genotyping project and protocol => check if we need to combine them or if they are the same. -->

<!-- ## Load downloaded vcf -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- vcf <- list() -->
<!-- vcf.read <- vcfR::read.vcfR(file=p2f, verbose=FALSE)   -->
<!-- vcf$gt <- vcfR::extract.gt(vcf.read, element = "GT", -->
<!--                            as.numeric=F, IDtoRowNames = T) -->
<!-- vcf$mrk.info <- tibble::as_tibble(vcfR::getFIX(vcf.read)) -->
<!-- vcf$mrk.info <- vcf$mrk.info |> -->
<!--   mutate(POS=as.numeric(POS)) |> arrange(CHROM, POS) -->
<!-- ap(vcf) -->
<!-- dim(vcf$gt) -->
<!-- gt <- vcf$gt -->
<!-- setdiff(geno_names, colnames(gt)) # 4 accessions missing -->

<!-- # other lines genotyped with this protocol not tested in this trial -->
<!-- length(setdiff(colnames(gt), geno_names))  -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- # Select genotyping protocol for each trial -->

<!-- Question: what to do with lines without any genotyping information? -->

<!-- ## Number of lines genotyped per trial and protocol -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- geno_matches_df[,protocols] <- apply(geno_matches_df[,protocols], 2, \(x){ -->
<!--   x[is.na(x)] <- FALSE -->
<!--   return(x) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- df <- tidyr::pivot_longer(geno_matches_df, cols=all_of(protocols)) |>  -->
<!--   group_by(trial,name) |>  -->
<!--   summarise(nb_lines_geno=sum(value)) |>  -->
<!--   filter(nb_lines_geno >0) |>  -->
<!--   arrange(desc(nb_lines_geno)) -->

<!-- print_table(df) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ## Add info -->

<!-- Add ratio of lines genotyped in each trial and protocol id -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- df <- df |>  -->
<!--   rowwise() |>  -->
<!--   mutate(nb_lines_trial = length(geno_number[[trial]]), -->
<!--          ratio_geno = round(100*nb_lines_geno/nb_lines_trial,1)) |>  -->
<!--   left_join(df_protocols, by=c("name"="protocol_name"))  -->
<!-- print_table(df) -->

<!-- ``` -->


<!-- # Seek associated trial metadata -->

<!-- For a given genotyping protocol, which lines have been genotyped? -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- ## start with one genotyping protocol -->
<!-- prot_id <- 299 ## wheat 3K for OHRWW_2025_SPO -->
<!-- trials <- wheat$wizard("trials", list(genotyping_protocols = prot_id))$data$names -->
<!-- length(trials) -->
<!-- ## restrict to the most recent years and to the target breeding program -->
<!-- trials <- wheat$wizard("trials", list(genotyping_protocols = prot_id,years=c(2022:2025),  -->
<!--                                       breeding_programs=c("University of Wisconsin")))$data$names -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- # Download vcf for all the selected trials -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- ## TODO -->
<!-- ``` -->




<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- resp <- wheat$get("/programs", page="all") -->
<!-- programs <- sort(sapply(resp$combined_data, \(x) { x$programName })) -->

<!-- selected_breeding_program <- "University of Nebraska" -->
<!-- resp <- wheat$get("/studies", query=list(programName=selected_breeding_program), page="all") -->
<!-- trials <- lapply(resp$combined_data, \(x) { list(id=x$studyDbId, name=x$studyName) }) -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- selected_trials <- c("","") -->
<!-- for ( trial_name in selected_trials ) { -->
<!--   resp <- wheat$get("/studies", query=list(studyName=trial_name)) -->
<!--   trial_metadata <- resp$data[[1]] -->
<!--   trial_id <- trial_metadata$studyDbId -->
<!--   location <- trial_metadata$locationName -->
<!--   planting_date <- trial_metadata$startDate -->
<!--   harvest_date <- trial_metadata$endDate -->
<!--   design <- trial_metadata$experimentalDesign$PUI -->
<!-- } -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- geno <- wheat$wizard("genotyping_protocols", list(accessions = "LINKERT")) -->

<!-- #geno <- wheat$wizard("genotyping_protocols", list(accessions = accessions$data$ids)) -->
<!-- ``` -->
